## Example

This is a basic example which shows you how to solve a common problem:

``` r

library(forestMetrics)
## basic example code
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`total_area()`](https://bitbacchus.github.io/forestMetrics/reference/total_area.md)
  : Compute total area of a landscape
